title: I'm Saying, That's Not It! / Don't Be Scared!
I Shouldn't Have Said That / Come Home!
How To Eat Things Like Bread Crusts / Mother's Sense of Justice
Mom, Your Eyes are Hazy? / The Spirit is Unnaturalized
It's Mom Again? / Father Likes That
Mikan, Give Up Being a Human / Yuzu, As Usual
Mom Can't Throw It Away / Yuzu is a Natto Expert
Ah! Noisy!
overview: A loud television causes problems for Mikan and Mother.

title: Father Struggles with a Pain Relief Patch
Mikan Is Stiff
overview: Falling asleep in her chair, Mikan finds herself waking up with a stiff back which causes many problems throughout the day.

title: Mother Tries to Remember Someone
overview: At a supermarket, mother encounters a familiar face and struggles to recall who she is.

title: Mikan Wants to Eat More
overview: Mikan is hungry at school and wants to eat plenty of food, but wants to watch her calories.

title: Yuzuhiko's Mechanical Pencil
overview: Kawashima admires Yuzuhiko's cherished mechanical pencil. Kawashima purchases the same mechanical pencil but isn't satisfied and eventually eyes Yuzuhiko's mechanical pencil.

title: Mikan's Handmade Hamburger Steak
overview: Mother is off on a two-day trip with friends and with Mikan in charge of dinner, she shows off her skills, determined to make a good meal. How will Father and Yuzuhiko react?

title: Jogging with Mother
overview: Mother accepts the fact that exercise is very important for your health. She resolves to start jogging but runs into a couple of obstacles along the way...

title: Father's Drowsy Drive
overview: Mother and Father are on the road. On the highway, Father is drowsy, so Mother tries to keep him awake in any way she can. What's the ultimate solution?

title: Mikan's Student ID Photo
overview: It's hard to look good in a photo. Mikan and her classmates are taking student ID photos and everyone is trying to look good. How will the photos turn out?

title: Yuzuhiko and a Melon
overview: Yuzuhiko, in awe at the rare sight of a melon at home, comes up with the ultimate plan to eat a whole melon himself...

title: Mother and Father's Hectic One-Night Trip
overview: Mother and Father visit a hot spring. On the way, Mother wants to check out some must-see spots. Afterwards at the the inn, they find themselves in a bit of hot water.

title: Bathroom Dreams
overview: Mikan and the Teddy Bear Brigade are chatting away about "bathroom dreams." What kind of strange dreams did they have?

title: Kawashima's Lonely Summer Break
overview: Kawashima is sad she can't see Yuzuhiko, so she rides her bike around the neighborhood, hoping to run into him. Meanwhile, Yuzuhiko happens to be shopping nearby.

title: Going to the Movies With Iwaki
overview: Hearing news that Yoshioka and Iwaki are going to watch a movie together, Mikan wants to tag along while Shimizu doesn't. They share their inner thoughts via "telepathy."
